# dkge

Design-Kernel Group Embedding (DKGE) turns subject-level GLM outputs
into a shared, design-aware latent space. It preserves the structure of
experimental designs, supports cross-validated contrasts, and provides
transport utilities for mapping parcellated fields onto common anchor or
voxel representations.

## Key capabilities

- **Flexible design kernels** – encode factorial structure, smoothness,
  and interactions to control how effects align across subjects.
- **Robust contrasts and inference** – LOSO/K-fold cross-fitting,
  analytic approximations, and bootstrap utilities for medoid or voxel
  maps.
- **Transport & rendering** – barycentric kNN and C++-accelerated
  Sinkhorn mappers with warm starts, anchor graph smoothing, and voxel
  decoders.
- **Classifier localisation** – cross-fitted latent classifiers with
  decoder, Haufe, and LOCO maps for bias-aware whole-brain
  interpretation.
- **Component interpretability** – convenience helpers for projecting
  new data, rotating components, and summarising variance explained.

## Installation

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("bbuchsbaum/dkge")
```

The package depends on `RcppArmadillo`, `future`, `multivarious`, and
other CRAN libraries; these install automatically.

## Getting started

``` r
library(dkge)

# simulate three subjects with four effects and five clusters
set.seed(1)
betas <- replicate(3, matrix(rnorm(4 * 5), 4, 5), simplify = FALSE)
designs <- replicate(3, qr.Q(qr(matrix(rnorm(60 * 4), 60, 4))), simplify = FALSE)

# fit DKGE with an identity kernel and rank 2
fit <- dkge(betas, designs, kernel = diag(4), rank = 2)

# project subjects into component space
scores <- dkge_project_btil(fit, fit$Btil)
str(scores, max.level = 1)
```

See the vignettes for full workflows:

- [`vignette("dkge-workflow")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-workflow.md)
- [`vignette("dkge-design-kernels")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-design-kernels.md)
- [`vignette("dkge-contrasts-inference")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-contrasts-inference.md)
- [`vignette("dkge-dense-rendering")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-dense-rendering.md)
- [`vignette("dkge-components")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-components.md)
- [`vignette("dkge-performance")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-performance.md)
- [`vignette("dkge-weighting")`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-weighting.md)

## Helper constructors

DKGE now provides small helper constructors that validate common
orchestration inputs. They shorten calls to
[`dkge_pipeline()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_pipeline.md)
and prediction helpers while keeping backward compatibility with raw
lists.

``` r
kernel <- diag(nrow(betas[[1]]))
transport <- dkge_transport_spec(
  centroids = centroids,
  sizes = sizes,
  medoid = 2
)
inference <- dkge_inference_spec(B = 1000, tail = "two.sided")
cls_spec <- dkge_classification_spec(targets = ~ condition, method = "lda")

results <- dkge_pipeline(
  betas = betas,
  designs = designs,
  kernel = kernel,
  contrasts = contrasts,
  transport = transport,
  inference = inference,
  classification = cls_spec
)
```

To score new subjects without manually assembling `B_list`, use
[`dkge_predict_subjects()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_predict_subjects.md):

``` r
pred <- dkge_predict_subjects(fit, betas = new_subjects, contrasts = my_contrasts)
```

## Documentation & support

Project home and documentation: <https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/dkge>.
Issues and feature requests are welcome on the [GitHub
tracker](https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/dkge/issues).

## Development

- Pull requests are encouraged; please accompany user-facing changes
  with tests and documentation.
- For large feature work, open an issue to discuss design choices before
  implementation.

## License

MIT License. See `LICENSE` for details.

# Package index

## Workflow — start here

Primary functions for fitting, contrasting, classifying, and predicting

- [`dkge()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge.md) : Fit
  DKGE across multiple subjects
- [`dkge_contrast()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_contrast.md)
  : Compute DKGE contrasts with cross-fitting
- [`dkge_classify()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_classify.md)
  : Cross-validated classification on DKGE effect patterns
- [`dkge_infer()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_infer.md)
  : Unified inference for DKGE contrasts
- [`dkge_predict()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_predict.md)
  : Predict DKGE contrasts for new subjects (out-of-sample)
- [`dkge_freeze()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_freeze.md)
  : Freeze a DKGE fit into a compact model for prediction
- [`dkge_bootstrap_analytic()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_bootstrap_analytic.md)
  : Analytic first-order bootstrap in the design space
- [`dkge_bootstrap_projected()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_bootstrap_projected.md)
  : Subject-level projection bootstrap in medoid space
- [`dkge_bootstrap_qspace()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_bootstrap_qspace.md)
  : Multiplier bootstrap in the design space (q-space)

## Advanced — model construction

Lower-level functions for custom workflows

- [`dkge_fit()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_fit.md)
  : Fit a Design-Kernel Group Embedding (DKGE) model
- [`dkge_fit_from_input()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_fit_from_input.md)
  : Fit DKGE from an input descriptor
- [`dkge_fit_from_kernels()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_fit_from_kernels.md)
  : Fit DKGE from precomputed subject effect kernels
- [`dkge_weights()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_weights.md)
  : Create a DKGE voxel-weight specification
- [`dkge_weights_auto()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_weights_auto.md)
  : Default DKGE weight specification
- [`dkge_weights_prior_mask()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_weights_prior_mask.md)
  : Build prior weights from a mask
- [`dkge_weights_prior_roi()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_weights_prior_roi.md)
  : Build prior weights from ROI labels
- [`design_kernel()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/design_kernel.md)
  [`dkge_design_kernel()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/design_kernel.md)
  : Build a flexible design-similarity kernel
- [`dkge_mapper()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_mapper.md)
  : Create a pluggable DKGE anchor mapper for dense rendering
- [`dkge_mapper_spec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_mapper_spec.md)
  : Specify a DKGE mapper strategy for the transport pipeline
- [`dkge_transport_spec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_spec.md)
  : Transport specification helper
- [`dkge_transport_contrasts_to_medoid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_contrasts_to_medoid.md)
  : Transport subject contrasts to a medoid parcellation
- [`dkge_transport_loadings_to_medoid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_loadings_to_medoid.md)
  : Transport component loadings to a medoid parcellation
- [`dkge_transport_to_medoid_sinkhorn()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_to_medoid_sinkhorn.md)
  [`dkge_transport_to_medoid_sinkhorn_cpp()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_to_medoid_sinkhorn.md)
  : Transport cluster values to a medoid via entropic Sinkhorn OT
- [`dkge_transport_to_voxels()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_to_voxels.md)
  : Transport DKGE quantities directly to voxel space
- [`dkge_transport_service()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transport_service.md)
  : Construct a transport service
- [`dkge_classification_spec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_classification_spec.md)
  : Classification specification helper
- [`dkge_inference_spec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_inference_spec.md)
  : Inference specification helper
- [`dkge_define_folds()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_define_folds.md)
  : Define folds for K-fold cross-validation
- [`dkge_subject()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_subject.md)
  : Construct a DKGE subject record
- [`dkge_data()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_data.md)
  : Bundle subject-level inputs for DKGE
- [`dkge_prepare_transport()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_prepare_transport.md)
  : Prepare subject-to-medoid transport operators for reuse
- [`dkge_pipeline()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_pipeline.md)
  : End-to-end DKGE workflow
- [`dkge_loso_contrast()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_loso_contrast.md)
  : Leave-one-subject-out DKGE contrast
- [`dkge_analytic_loso()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_analytic_loso.md)
  : Analytic LOSO contrast using eigenvalue perturbation
- [`dkge_contrast_validated()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_contrast_validated.md)
  : Dual-path DKGE contrasts with coverage diagnostics
- [`dkge_cv_kernel_grid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cv_kernel_grid.md)
  : LOSO kernel grid search
- [`dkge_cv_kernel_rank()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cv_kernel_rank.md)
  : Combined kernel and rank selection via pre-screening and LOSO CV
- [`dkge_cv_rank_loso()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cv_rank_loso.md)
  : LOSO cross-validation for rank selection
- [`dkge_cv_train_latent_classifier()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cv_train_latent_classifier.md)
  : Cross-fitted linear classifiers in the DKGE latent space
- [`dkge_pooled_cov_q()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_pooled_cov_q.md)
  : Pooled design-space covariance and Cholesky factor
- [`dkge_predict_loadings()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_predict_loadings.md)
  : Predict DKGE loadings for new subjects (out-of-sample)
- [`dkge_predict_stream()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_predict_stream.md)
  : Streaming prediction for new subjects via a loader
- [`dkge_predict_subjects()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_predict_subjects.md)
  : Convenience prediction for subject collections
- [`dkge_preprocess_blocks()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_preprocess_blocks.md)
  : Preprocess multiple blocks into the DKGE training space
- [`dkge_project_btil()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_project_block.md)
  [`dkge_project_block()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_project_block.md)
  : Project DKGE data into component space
- [`dkge_project_blocks()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_project_blocks.md)
  : Project new blocks into DKGE score space
- [`dkge_project_cluster()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_project_cluster.md)
  : Project a new cluster/voxel vector onto DKGE components
- [`dkge_project_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_project_clusters.md)
  : Project multiple cluster/voxel vectors
- [`dkge_project_clusters_to_latent()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_project_clusters_to_latent.md)
  : Project subject clusters into the DKGE latent space
- [`dkge_sim_toy()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_sim_toy.md)
  : Simulate toy DKGE datasets with known factorial structure
- [`dkge_update_weights()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_update_weights.md)
  : Refit a DKGE object with a new voxel-weight specification

## Anchors and rendering

Functions for building and applying spatial anchor mappers

- [`dkge_build_renderer()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_build_renderer.md)
  : Prepare reusable rendering objects for a fitted DKGE model
- [`dkge_render_subject_values()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_render_subject_values.md)
  : Render per-subject values to anchors and voxels
- [`dkge_build_anchor_kernels()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_build_anchor_kernels.md)
  : Fold-aware anchor kernel construction
- [`dkge_make_anchors()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_make_anchors.md)
  : Build or validate anchor coordinates in MNI space
- [`dkge_anchor_aggregate()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_aggregate.md)
  : Aggregate anchor fields with optional Laplacian smoothing
- [`dkge_anchor_contrast_from_direction()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_contrast_from_direction.md)
  : Build an anchor contrast from a feature-space direction
- [`dkge_anchor_contrast_from_prototypes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_contrast_from_prototypes.md)
  : Build an anchor contrast from prototype feature sets
- [`dkge_anchor_diagnostics()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_diagnostics.md)
  : Extract anchor diagnostics from a DKGE fit
- [`dkge_anchor_fit()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_fit.md)
  : Fit DKGE using feature-anchored subject kernels
- [`dkge_anchor_graph()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_graph.md)
  : Construct a kNN anchor graph and Laplacian
- [`dkge_anchor_targets_from_directions()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_targets_from_directions.md)
  : Assemble anchor targets from feature-space directions
- [`dkge_anchor_targets_from_prototypes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_targets_from_prototypes.md)
  : Assemble anchor targets from prototype sets
- [`dkge_anchor_to_voxel_apply()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_to_voxel_apply.md)
  : Decode anchor values to voxel space
- [`dkge_anchor_to_voxel_fit()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_anchor_to_voxel_fit.md)
  : Fit a sparse anchor-to-voxel decoder
- [`dkge_input_anchor()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_input_anchor.md)
  : Anchor-based DKGE input descriptor
- [`fit_mapper()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/fit_mapper.md)
  : Fit a mapper on subject/reference features
- [`predict_mapper()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/predict_mapper.md)
  : Apply a fitted mapper to new source values
- [`apply_mapper()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/apply_mapper.md)
  : Apply a fitted mapper to values

## Extension points — S3 generics

Generics for integrating custom kernels, folds, and inputs

- [`as_dkge_kernel()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/as_dkge_kernel.md)
  : Convert to a DKGE design kernel
- [`as_dkge_folds()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/as_dkge_folds.md)
  : Convert to DKGE fold assignments
- [`dkge_run_service()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_run_service.md)
  : Run a dkge service object
- [`dkge_contrast_service()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_contrast_service.md)
  : Construct a contrast service
- [`dkge_inference_service()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_inference_service.md)
  : Construct an inference service

## Kernel and alignment utilities

Design kernels, K-Procrustes alignment, and kernel diagnostics

- [`kernel_alignment()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/kernel_alignment.md)
  [`dkge_kernel_alignment()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/kernel_alignment.md)
  : Kernel alignment score
- [`kernel_roots()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/kernel_roots.md)
  [`dkge_kernel_roots()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/kernel_roots.md)
  : Robust kernel roots
- [`dkge_kernel_prescreen()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_kernel_prescreen.md)
  : Kernel alignment pre-screening
- [`dkge_k_orthonormalize()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_k_orthonormalize.md)
  : Robust K-orthonormalization
- [`dkge_procrustes_K()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_procrustes_K.md)
  : K-orthogonal Procrustes alignment
- [`dkge_align_bases_K()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_align_bases_K.md)
  : Align multiple bases to a reference
- [`dkge_consensus_basis_K()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_consensus_basis_K.md)
  : Consensus K-orthonormal basis (K-Procrustes mean)
- [`dkge_projector_K()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_projector_K.md)
  : K-orthogonal projector onto span(T) in effect space
- [`dkge_cosines_K()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cosines_K.md)
  : Principal-angle cosines in the K-metric
- [`dkge_jd_control()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_jd_control.md)
  : Control parameters for DKGE joint diagonalisation
- [`dkge_align_effects()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_align_effects.md)
  : Align effect kernels across subjects with partial overlap
- [`dkge_target_factor()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_target_factor.md)
  : Target helper for a single factor
- [`dkge_target_interaction()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_target_interaction.md)
  : Target helper for an interaction
- [`dkge_targets()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_targets.md)
  : Build classification targets from a DKGE fit

## Cluster and CPCA utilities

Cluster-level projections and CPCA filtering

- [`dkge_cpca_fit()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cpca_fit.md)
  : Fit DKGE with CPCA filtering
- [`dkge_fit_cpca()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_fit_cpca.md)
  : Fit DKGE bases on CPCA-filtered components
- [`dkge_cpca_split_chat()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cpca_split_chat.md)
  : Split compressed covariance into design/residual parts (CPCA
  inside-span)
- [`dkge_cluster_betas()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cluster_betas.md)
  : Compute cluster-level betas from neuroim2 objects
- [`dkge_cluster_loadings()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cluster_loadings.md)
  : Cluster-to-latent loadings for DKGE subjects
- [`dkge_cluster_ts()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_cluster_ts.md)
  : Aggregate voxel time series into cluster means
- [`dkge_regress()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_regress.md)
  : Multi-output regression on DKGE effects
- [`dkge_transform_block()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_transform_block.md)
  : Preprocess a subject block into DKGE training space
- [`dkge_neuro_loader()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_neuro_loader.md)
  : Build a streaming loader backed by neuroim2 objects

## Visualization and diagnostics

Plotting and metric functions

- [`dkge_plot_effect_loadings()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_plot_effect_loadings.md)
  : Effect-space loadings heatmap (K %\*% U)
- [`dkge_plot_info_anchor()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_plot_info_anchor.md)
  : Anchor-level information plots
- [`dkge_plot_scree()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_plot_scree.md)
  : DKGE scree plot with cumulative curve
- [`dkge_plot_subject_contrib()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_plot_subject_contrib.md)
  : Subject weights and per-component energy heatmap
- [`dkge_plot_subspace_stability()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_plot_subspace_stability.md)
  : Subspace stability via principal angles
- [`dkge_plot_suite()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_plot_suite.md)
  : DKGE "Five Fundamentals" dashboard
- [`dkge_diagnostics()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_diagnostics.md)
  : Summarise DKGE diagnostics
- [`dkge_component_stats()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_component_stats.md)
  [`dkge_write_component_stats()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_component_stats.md)
  : Component-level consensus statistics
- [`dkge_variance_explained()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_variance_explained.md)
  : Compute per-component variance explained
- [`dkge_info_map_from_classifier()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_info_map_from_classifier.md)
  : Decoder-style information map from latent classifier weights
- [`dkge_info_map_haufe()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_info_map_haufe.md)
  : Haufe-style encoding maps from latent classifiers
- [`dkge_info_map_loco()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_info_map_loco.md)
  : Group-LOCO anchor importance (zeroing proxy)
- [`dkge_confusion()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_confusion.md)
  : Fold-wise confusion matrices for DKGE classification
- [`dkge_paint_medoid_map()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_paint_medoid_map.md)
  : Paint medoid cluster values back to a label volume
- [`theme_dkge()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/theme_dkge.md)
  : DKGE minimal theme for ggplot2 outputs

## Internal building blocks

Low-level functions exposed for advanced use and testing

- [`dkge_freedman_lane()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_freedman_lane.md)
  : Freedman-Lane permutations for DKGE (scaffold)
- [`dkge_signflip_maxT()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_signflip_maxT.md)
  : One-sample sign-flip max-T inference on transported subject maps
- [`dkge_one_se()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_one_se.md)
  : One standard-error rule selection helper
- [`dkge_component_stats()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_component_stats.md)
  [`dkge_write_component_stats()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_component_stats.md)
  : Component-level consensus statistics
- [`dkge_write_group_map()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_write_group_map.md)
  : Write a group map as NIfTI using a medoid label image
- [`dkge_clear_sinkhorn_cache()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge_clear_sinkhorn_cache.md)
  : Clear cached dual variables for Sinkhorn warm-starts
- [`helmert_contrasts()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/helmert_contrasts.md)
  : Helmert contrasts for a set of factors
- [`sum_contrasts()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/sum_contrasts.md)
  : Sum-to-zero contrasts for a set of factors
- [`dkpp_select_anchors()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkpp_select_anchors.md)
  : Determinantal k-means++ (d-kpp) anchor selection
- [`pairwise_sqdist_cpp()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/pairwise_sqdist_cpp.md)
  : Pairwise squared distances between two point sets (rows)
- [`predict(`*`<dkge>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/predict.dkge.md)
  [`predict(`*`<dkge_model>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/predict.dkge.md)
  : Predict contrasts for new subjects using a DKGE fit
- [`print(`*`<dkge_contrasts>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/print.dkge_contrasts.md)
  : Print method for dkge_contrasts
- [`print(`*`<dkge_folds>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/print.dkge_folds.md)
  : Print method for dkge_folds
- [`print(`*`<dkge_inference>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/print.dkge_inference.md)
  : Print method for dkge_inference
- [`as.data.frame(`*`<dkge_inference>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/as.data.frame.dkge_inference.md)
  : Convert DKGE inference results to a tidy data frame
- [`as.matrix(`*`<dkge_contrasts>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/as.matrix.dkge_contrasts.md)
  : Extract contrast values as matrix
- [`dkge-info-maps`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge-info-maps.md)
  : DKGE classifier information maps
- [`dkge-latent-utils`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/reference/dkge-latent-utils.md)
  : DKGE latent-space utilities

  Workflow](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-workflow.md):

  DKGE](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-classification.md):

  Interpretability](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/dkge/articles/dkge-components.md):
